name: Top Quark Tagging Reference Dataset
description: 1.2M training jets (600k top, 600k QCD) and 400k test jets. Each jet contains up to 200 constituents represented as (pT, η, φ, E) 4-momenta. Generated with PYTHIA8 + DELPHES fast detector simulation.

name: Quark-Gluon Dataset (CMS Open Data)
description: Jet images and particle lists derived from CMS Open Data collision events. 700k training jets, balanced quark/gluon classes.

name: PDEBench Navier-Stokes
description: 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes trajectories at multiple viscosities (ν=1e-3, 1e-4, 1e-5). Each trajectory is 1000 time steps on a 64×64 spatial grid.

name: WeatherBench 2 (ERA5)
description: ERA5 reanalysis data at 1.5° resolution for global weather forecasting benchmarking. Covers 1979–2022. Standard train/validation/test splits defined by WeatherBench 2.

name: MD17
description: Ab-initio molecular dynamics trajectories for 8 small organic molecules (aspirin, benzene, ethanol, malonaldehyde, naphthalene, salicylic acid, toluene, uracil). Energies and forces computed at DFT level.
